name: convention enforcement: the engineering catalog secures the Terraform Bicep and CloudFormation style sources
command: grep -q hashicorp-terraform-style-guide "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/cloud-engineering-sources.yaml" && grep -q azure-bicep-best-practices "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/cloud-engineering-sources.yaml" && grep -q aws-cloudformation-best-practices "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/cloud-engineering-sources.yaml" && echo secured 1>&2
